deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'ENTRY=${SERVICE_ENTRY:-server}; if [ "$ENTRY" = "worker" ] || [ "$ENTRY" = "download-worker" ]; then ENTRY=queues/worker; fi; if [ "$ENTRY" = "processing-worker" ]; then ENTRY=queues/processing-worker; fi; npm run prisma:generate; if [ ! -f "dist/${ENTRY}.js" ]; then npm run build; fi; if [ -z "$SERVICE_ENTRY" ] || [ "$SERVICE_ENTRY" = "server" ]; then npm run prisma:migrate; fi; node "dist/${ENTRY}.js"'
